title: Hegseth Faces Second Day of Democratic Scrutiny Over Iran War Defense Budget

contents:
# Hegseth Faces Second Day of Democratic Scrutiny Over Iran War Defense Budget

## Event Overview

Pete Hegseth faced a second day of questioning from Democrats in the Senate over the proposed $25 billion 2027 military defense budget tied to the Iran war. The hearing followed a six-hour House Armed Services Committee session. Bipartisan lawmakers pressed on funding for escalated operations.

## Context and Reporting

Reporting attached to OSINT source profile @key2med (twitter-key-to-med) highlights this development within the past hour. The reporting window covers 2026-04-30T20:27Z through 2026-04-30T21:27Z. Topical scope encompasses Iran war, military budget, Senate hearing, defense spending, Hegseth. Geographic focus centers on Washington, DC.
